languages.text: {n}Сухое шипение, обычно доносящееся из вокса генетора, вдруг становится выше: {/n} "Зафиксировано беспрецедентное повышение эффективности {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g}! Реки священных масел омывают их железную плоть, и механизмы поют, восхваляя Омниссию! Да будет благословлено решение, что привело к этому чуду перерождения!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Сухое шипение, обычно доносящееся из вокса генетора, вдруг становится выше: {/n} "Зафиксировано беспрецедентное повышение эффективности {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g}! Реки священных масел омывают их железную плоть, и механизмы поют, восхваляя Омниссию! Да будет благословлено решение, что привело к этому чуду перерождения!"

languages.text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

languages.text: {n}通常はジェネレーターのボイスから聞こえる乾いたヒスが、突然高くなる。{/n}「機械霊の機能状態がかつてないほど向上していることを検知した！聖なる油が鉄の肉体を流れ、機械がオムニシアの賛歌を奏でる！この再生の奇跡に導いた決断に感謝！」
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented improvement in the functioning conditions of the machine spirits! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

traits.locale_text: 通常はジェネレーターのボイスから聞こえる乾いたヒスが、突然高くなる。{n}「機械霊の機能状態がかつてないほど向上していることを検知した！聖なる油が鉄の肉体を流れ、機械がオムニシアの賛歌を奏でる！この再生の奇跡に導いた決断に感謝！」

languages.text: {n}Genetör'ün voksundan normalde çıkan kuru tıslama, aniden tizleşiyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Makine ruhlarının{/g} işleyiş verimliliğinde benzeri görülmemiş bir artış kaydediliyor! Kutsal özyağ nehirleri, demir etlerini yıkıyor. Mekanizmalar, Hermesih'e övgüler düzüyor! Bu yeniden doğuş mucizesine yol açan karara şükürler olsun!"
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetör'ün voksundan normalde çıkan kuru tıslama, aniden tizleşiyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Makine ruhlarının{/g} işleyiş verimliliğinde benzeri görülmemiş bir artış kaydediliyor! Kutsal özyağ nehirleri, demir etlerini yıkıyor. Mekanizmalar, Hermesih'e övgüler düzüyor! Bu yeniden doğuş mucizesine yol açan karara şükürler olsun!"

languages.text: {n}El seco siseo que suele proceder del voco del genetor se vuelve agudo de repente: {/n} «¡Registrando un aumento sin precedentes en la eficacia de funcionamiento de los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}! ¡Ríos de ungüentos sagrados corren por su carne de hierro y los mecanismos cantan las alabanzas del Omnissiah! ¡Bendita sea la decisión que ha conducido a esta milagrosa resurrección!».
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El seco siseo que suele proceder del voco del genetor se vuelve agudo de repente: {/n} «¡Registrando un aumento sin precedentes en la eficacia de funcionamiento de los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}! ¡Ríos de ungüentos sagrados corren por su carne de hierro y los mecanismos cantan las alabanzas del Omnissiah! ¡Bendita sea la decisión que ha conducido a esta milagrosa resurrección!».

languages.text: {n}基因士音阵平时的干涩嘶声突然变得高亢。{/n}“登记到{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}运作效率的空前改善！神圣机油的河流冲刷钢铁血肉，机械正在歌颂欧姆尼赛亚！赞美那促成此重生神迹的决断！”
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}基因士音阵平时的干涩嘶声突然变得高亢。{/n}“登记到{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}运作效率的空前改善！神圣机油的河流冲刷钢铁血肉，机械正在歌颂欧姆尼赛亚！赞美那促成此重生神迹的决断！”

languages.text: {n}Le sifflement sec émis habituellement par le vox du genetor prend soudain une tonalité plus aiguë. {/n} « Constat d'une augmentation sans précédent de l'efficacité fonctionnelle des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} ! Des flots d'onguents sacrés abreuvent leur chair de fer et les mécanismes chantent les louanges de l'Omnimessie ! Bénie soit la décision qui a engendré cette renaissance miraculeuse ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sifflement sec émis habituellement par le vox du genetor prend soudain une tonalité plus aiguë. {/n} « Constat d'une augmentation sans précédent de l'efficacité fonctionnelle des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} ! Des flots d'onguents sacrés abreuvent leur chair de fer et les mécanismes chantent les louanges de l'Omnimessie ! Bénie soit la décision qui a engendré cette renaissance miraculeuse ! »

languages.text: {n}Das trockene Zischen, das üblicherweise aus dem Vox des Genetors ertönt, wird plötzlich höher: {/n} "Registriere eine beispiellose Erhöhung der funktionalen Effizienz der {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g}! Ströme heiliger Substanzen umspülen ihr eisernes Fleisch, und die Mechanismen singen Lobpreisungen des Omnissiah! Gesegnet sei die Entscheidung, die dieses Wunder der Wiedergeburt hervorbrachte!"
languages.original_text: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"
